dvids.title: CENTCOM Commander Provides Update on Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: U.S. Navy Adm. Brad Cooper, commander of CENTCOM, provides an update on Operation Epic Fury, April 9, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: USS Abraham Lincoln supports Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: U.S. Sailors aboard USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) conduct flight operations during Operation Epic Fury, April 7, 2026. (U.S. Navy video)
